step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("retraction of mandible")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Based on the provided information, I concur with my earlier stance regarding the lateral pterygoid playing a key role in mandibular retraction. The detailed descriptions highlight how each muscle contributes uniquely to mandibular movements, emphasizing that among them, the lateral pterygoid stands out specifically because it facilitates both downward (depression) and forward motions (protraction/retraction).
